mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_name, user_type, target_id, target_type, score, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scores (id, user_id, user_name, user_type, target_id, target_type, score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{score}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE scores SET score = #{score}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM scores WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scores WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
SELECT AVG(score) FROM scores WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
